package middleware

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "regexp"
    "strings"
    "text/template"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_allocates_regex_or_template_per_request: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Regexp compilation inside Gin handlers instead of using precompiled patterns.
type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestModel
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMiddlewareAllocatesRegexOrTemplatePerRequestDTO) error {
    matcher := regexp.MustCompile("^" + regexp.QuoteMeta(c.Query("status")) + "$")
    rowTemplate := template.Must(template.New("audit-row").Parse("tenant={{.TenantID}} status={{.Status}}"))

    var rendered strings.Builder
    for _, item := range items {
        if matcher.MatchString(item.Status) {
            _ = rowTemplate.Execute(&rendered, item)
        }
    }

    c.Set("audit_preview", rendered.String())
    return nil
}
